# backgroundColor()

**Instance Method**

Returns the background color of the composition picker view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func backgroundColor() -> NSColor!
```

## Return Value

The background color.

## Setting and Getting the Background Color

- **setBackgroundColor(_:)**: Sets the background color for the composition picker view.
